CustomField.formula: IF(Quote_Grand_Total__c < 0, "(", "") & "$" & IF(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) >= 1000000000, TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) / 1000000000)) & ",", "") & IF(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) >= 1000000, RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) / 1000000)), 3) & ',', "") & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ))), 3) & "." & IF(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) , 1) * 100 < 10, "0" & TEXT(ROUND(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) , 1), 2) * 100), TEXT(MIN(ROUND(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c ) , 1), 2) * 100, 99))) & IF(Quote_Grand_Total__c < 0, ")", "")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This allows us to show the Quote Grand Total in email templates with the correct currency formatting.
CustomField.label: Quote Grand Total for Email Template
